title: Astral Enchant
body:
# Astral Enchant
[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/astralenchant?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth&color=%2300af5c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/astralenchant)
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1425211?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=CurseForge&color=%23F56A00)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/astralenchant)
[![GitHub License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/scratch221171/Astral-Enchants-1.21.1?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/scratch221171/Astral-Enchants-1.21.1)

<font color="#ff0000">***Note: This mod is still in alpha.***  
*It is strongly recommended to back up your data before installing this mod.*</font>

# What does this mod do?
This mod adds several craftable enchantments designed for technical and heavily modded gameplay.

Most enchantments in this mod focus on **functionality rather than raw stat boosts**, making them less susceptible to power inflation in heavily modded environments.

The few enchantments that modify attributes use **percentage-based scaling**, allowing them to remain effective even when player stats become exceptionally large.

Some enchantments are extremely powerful and expensive. If you do not like them, they can be disabled via the config.

## Examples
<details>
<summary>Mitigation Piercing – weapon</summary>

![mitigation piercing gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fc3510046ab9143d5f002e23938e33b6e7d73c7.gif)
![Mitigation Piercing recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb0c9baf0da7080e5f854ac4b892635b08abcf29.png)

  Attacks with this item penetrate various forms of damage reduction, such as armor, potion effects, and invulnerability.

  May not work on mobs with hard-coded damage logic from other mods.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Feather Touch – mining tools</summary>

![feather touch gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e6608d08f551057bf3b5f586ce3b2d345cf57cc.gif)
![Feather Touch recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a73017e3a6b030fa08db14a82c341512ab9ccf3c.png)

  Allows you to collect all destructible blocks. While crouching, the block’s internal data is stored in the item.

  *Warning: Nesting containers can create NBT bombs. Use caution when using this enchantment in multiplayer environments.*

</details>
<details>
<summary>Compatibility – bundle</summary>

![compatibility gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e83d66d6d8fefa75a1d42576f7d6274fa88ccb6b.gif)
![Compatibility recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b433a71bf7ad9ad274190a053339b99d202b1537.png)

  
  Enchantments applied to a bundle with this enchantment are applied to the items inside it, ignoring conflicts and other restrictions. Also prevents bundle repair costs from increasing.

</details>

All enchantments(currently: 19) can be toggled individually via the config.
Some enchantments have individual detailed settings.

*Warning: Some enchantments require bundles. Enable vanilla bundle recipes in the experimental features to use them.*

**[Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions) is supported.**

**A recipe viewer mod (such as [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)) is recommended.**
